dsVert 1.1.0
  • Reference

Per-cluster residual sums for LMM REML updates

Source: R/dsvertClusterDS.R
dsvertClusterResidualsDS.Rd

Given a plaintext betahat and intercept from the client, compute per-cluster \(\sum_{ij} r_{ij}\) and \(\sum_{ij} r_{ij}^2\) and return the aggregate vector (one scalar per cluster). Clusters below the privacy threshold are suppressed.

Usage

dsvertClusterResidualsDS(
  data_name,
  y_var,
  x_names,
  betahat,
  intercept = 0,
  cluster_col
)

Arguments

data_name

Character. Aligned data-frame name.

y_var

Outcome column (on this server).

x_names

Predictor names on this server.

betahat

Coefficients for x_names.

intercept

Scalar intercept.

cluster_col

Cluster column.

Value

list(rsum_per_cluster, rss_per_cluster, n_per_cluster).
